text: Which specific type of shipboard pollution or hazardous substance does MARPOL Annex III deal with?

options.text: Harmful substances carried at sea in packaged form
Heavy fuel oil sludge from purifiers
Exhaust gas emissions from main engines

explanation: MARPOL Annex III contains regulations for the prevention of pollution by harmful substances carried by sea in packaged form, including containers, portable tanks, or road/rail tank wagons, focusing on identification and proper stowage.
